title: App Settings - General - About - New update available
scenario: Verify that when an app update is available, the About section displays update details, and tapping Release Notes opens and closes correctly while tapping Update opens the app store.
steps: 1. Ensure an app update is available on the Cloud.
2. Navigate to the About section under General.
3. Observe the displayed elements: 'App Updates Needed' message, 'Update' button, current and available firmware versions, and a link to Release Notes.
5. Verify that the release notes page opens at https://info.lens.poly.com/lens-mobile-rn showing info about the latest and older versions.
6. Tap the 'X' button on the Release Notes page.
7. Verify that the Release Notes closes and returns the user to the General section with About expanded.
9. Verify that the app store page for Poly Lens opens.
expected: The About section under General displays an 'App Updates Needed' message, an 'Update' button, current and available firmware versions, and a link to Release Notes. Tapping the Release Notes link opens the release notes page (https://info.lens.poly.com/lens-mobile-rn) showing info about the latest and older versions. Tapping the 'X' button closes the Release Notes and returns the user to the General section with About expanded. Tapping the 'Update' button opens the app store page for Poly Lens.
